name: Dril-Quip, Inc.
description: Dril-Quip, Inc. designs, manufactures, sells, and services highly engineered drilling and production equipment for use in deepwater, harsh environments, and severe service applications worldwide. The company's products include subsea and surface wellheads, subsea production trees, mudline hanger systems, specialty connectors and pipe, liner hangers, and wellhead systems. It serves major integrated, independent, and foreign national oil and gas companies, as well as drilling contractors.
